title: Alpha Leaves Fix
description: A simple mod that fixes leaf decay in Alpha 1.1.x
body:
A simple mod that replaces the broken leaf decay code in Minecraft Alpha 1.1.x with that of Alpha 1.0.4.

This mod fixes the annoying issue of leaves decaying for seemingly no reason in Alpha 1.1, so trees look correct no matter how many times you walk past them.

Some naturally generated leaves on the fancy trees still decay, but the problem is about 90% fixed I would say
